security.csp: default-src 'self' tauri:; img-src 'self' data: https://firebasestorage.googleapis.com blob: tauri:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; connect-src 'self' https://*.firebaseio.com https://*.googleapis.com https://*.firebaseapp.com https://*.cloudfunctions.net wss://*.firebaseio.com https://firebasestorage.googleapis.com

bundle.longDescription: A desktop application to help you randomly pick nail polish colors from your collection
